stdout:
== topology ==
[Error] g3rs-topology/no-nested-workspaces crates/nested/Cargo.toml Nested workspace `crates/nested` is forbidden
  `crates/nested/Cargo.toml` declares a nested workspace under `.`. Cargo does not support nested workspaces. Remove the `[workspace]` section from this Cargo.toml, or move it so it is not nested under `.`.
[Error] g3rs-topology/no-nested-guardrail3-rs-toml crates/member/guardrail3-rs.toml Nested adopted Rust unit `crates/member` is forbidden
  `crates/member/guardrail3-rs.toml` declares a nested adopted Rust unit under `.`. Nested guardrail3 adoption breaks ownership routing. Remove `crates/member/guardrail3-rs.toml`, or move the inner unit so it is not nested under `.`.
[Error] g3rs-topology/declared-workspace-members-only Cargo.toml Workspace `.` has extra member `crates/missing`
  `Cargo.toml` declares workspace member `crates/missing`, but it does not match a real owned child Rust root. Workspace membership must exactly match real child Rust roots. Remove `crates/missing` from `[workspace] members`, or create the missing crate.
[Error] g3rs-topology/declared-workspace-members-only crates/unlisted/Cargo.toml Workspace child `crates/unlisted` must be declared explicitly
  `crates/unlisted/Cargo.toml` sits under workspace `.`, but it is not a declared workspace member. Workspace membership must exactly match real child Rust roots. Add this crate's path to `[workspace] members` in `./Cargo.toml`.
[Error] g3rs-topology/member-paths-must-not-escape-root Cargo.toml Workspace `.` uses escaping member path `../outside`
  `Cargo.toml` declares member pattern `../outside`, which points outside the workspace directory. Workspace members must be relative subdirectory paths inside the workspace root, not absolute paths or `..` escapes. Change the pattern to a relative subdirectory path, or move the target crate inside the workspace.
[Error] g3rs-topology/workspace-local-file-placement crates/member/rustfmt.toml `fmt` file `crates/member/rustfmt.toml` is illegally placed
  fmt files must live at the validation root, not inside a workspace member or nested subdirectory.
[Error] g3rs-topology/workspace-local-file-placement crates/member/.cargo/config `clippy` file `crates/member/.cargo/config` is illegally placed
  `crates/member/.cargo/config` is attached to legal workspace member `crates/member`. Workspace-local `clippy` files must live at the workspace root `.` instead of inside a member crate.
[Error] g3rs-topology/workspace-local-file-placement crates/member/.cargo/config.toml `clippy` file `crates/member/.cargo/config.toml` is illegally placed
  `crates/member/.cargo/config.toml` is attached to legal workspace member `crates/member`. Workspace-local `clippy` files must live at the workspace root `.` instead of inside a member crate.

== cargo ==
[Info] g3rs-cargo/workspace-lints Cargo.toml workspace lint tables present
  `Cargo.toml` defines all required cargo policy lint tables and entries.
[Info] g3rs-cargo/lint-levels Cargo.toml lint levels match policy
  `Cargo.toml` uses the expected lint levels for this Cargo policy file.
[Info] g3rs-cargo/workspace-metadata Cargo.toml edition policy satisfied
  `Cargo.toml` declares edition `2024`.
[Info] g3rs-cargo/priority-order Cargo.toml specific lint priorities are safe
  Specific clippy deny lints do not use negative priority.
[Info] g3rs-cargo/resolver Cargo.toml workspace resolver set
  Workspace resolver = `2`
[Info] g3rs-cargo/disallowed-macros-deny Cargo.toml disallowed macros lint enforced
  `[workspace.lints.clippy]` enforces `clippy::disallowed_macros = "deny"`.
[Info] g3rs-cargo/unapproved-allow-entries Cargo.toml no unapproved allow entries
  `Cargo.toml` does not introduce manifest-level allow entries outside the approved inventory.
[Info] g3rs-cargo/rust-version-policy Cargo.toml library rust-version declared
  `Cargo.toml` declares `rust-version = "1.85"`.
[Info] g3rs-cargo/workspace-lints-inherited crates/member/Cargo.toml workspace lints inherited
  member_with_local_policy_files: `[lints] workspace = true` inherits workspace lint policy
[Info] g3rs-cargo/no-weakened-overrides crates/member/Cargo.toml no weakened overrides
  `crates/member/Cargo.toml` does not weaken inherited workspace lint policy.
[Info] g3rs-cargo/member-edition-drift crates/member/Cargo.toml member edition aligns with workspace
  crates/member does not downgrade the workspace edition.
[Info] g3rs-cargo/member-local-allows-forbidden crates/member/Cargo.toml no member-local allow entries
  `crates/member/Cargo.toml` does not add member-local allow entries on top of inherited policy.
[Warn] g3rs-cargo/missing-member-cargo Cargo.toml declared workspace member missing Cargo.toml
  `../outside` is declared in `[workspace].members` but no `Cargo.toml` was discovered there. Remove it from `[workspace].members` or create a `Cargo.toml` at that path.
[Warn] g3rs-cargo/missing-member-cargo Cargo.toml declared workspace member missing Cargo.toml
  `crates/missing` is declared in `[workspace].members` but no `Cargo.toml` was discovered there. Remove it from `[workspace].members` or create a `Cargo.toml` at that path.
[Info] g3rs-cargo/input-failures Cargo.toml cargo-family inputs parsed cleanly
  Active Cargo policy inputs parsed without cargo-family input failures.
